phases.name: fork_and_configure
steps: generate 5 niche YAML configs via claude -p with PRINTMAXX branding and curated widget sets

phases.name: deploy_and_screenshot
steps: npm build with indie-hacker config as showcase default
playwright screenshot each config variant for listing assets

phases.name: list_and_distribute
steps: post to r/selfhosted r/homelab with before/after screenshots
generate SEO landing page at builds/dashy-command-center/index.html
